movie.actors: Martin Lawrence, Will Smith, Jordi Mollà, Gabrielle Union
movie.plot: Narcotics cops Mike Lowrey (Will Smith) and Marcus Burnett (Martin Lawrence) head up a task force investigating the flow of ecstasy into Miami. Their search leads to a dangerous kingpin Johnny Tapia (Jordi Mollà), whose plan to control the city's drug traffic has touched off an underground war. Meanwhile, things get sexy between Mike and Syd (Gabrielle Union), Marcus's sister.
movie.title: Bad Boys II
movie.writer: George Gallo (characters), Marianne Wibberley (story), Cormac Wibberley (story), Ron Shelton (story), Ron Shelton (screenplay), Jerry Stahl (screenplay)
